context.description: Metadata regarding the current stock context and timestamp.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the analysis was generated (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).

previous_close.description: The stock's previous closing price as a float. Taken from the input price field.

analysis.description: Detailed news evaluation and cross-referenced sentiment data.

sentiment_score.description: Sentiment score normalized between -1.0 (extremely negative) and 1.0 (extremely positive).

critical_news_summary.description: Array of 3-7 single-sentence headline points summarizing the most material news.

news_reports.description: Individual relevant news articles compiled from verified sources.

title.description: The exact article headline or news release title.

source.description: The media or regulatory source name.

published_at.description: The earliest identified publication timestamp in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format.

url.description: The direct URL to the article. Write URL_NOT_CONFIRMED if the exact URL cannot be verified from a search result.

impact_analysis.description: Contextual impact statement highlighting specific effects on the asset.

summary_points.description: Exactly three key takeaways: (1) a specific metric, (2) structural implication, (3) short-term price impact.

news_price_affect_rank.description: Weighted aggregate price impact across ALL news reports. Each report is scored individually (-5 to +5 by catalyst type) then multiplied by a time-decay weight (1.0 for <6h, 0.7 for 6-24h, 0.4 for 24-48h, 0.2 for 48-72h). The weighted sum is clamped to [-5, 5] and rounded to an integer. 0 means no material news found. Sign must be consistent with news_sentiment.

notes.description: Critical edge-case info or high-risk rumor flags. Leave as an empty string if none exist.
